text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Dance platforms, fans, and form-fitting outfits! 
This is the glamour of the bubble, girls! Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So this is Bubblyland…!
One month ago, during a practice race at the academy…

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Scarlet and Spe came in dead last?!

text_block_list.name: Well-informed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I know Scarlet recently had a fever, but I wonder why Spe 
did so poorly? Actually… she looks like she might've gained 
some weight, but…

text_block_list.name: Spe and Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff… Huff… Huff! I can't afford to run like that anymore! I have to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Gah! It's been a month already, but I still can't get out 
of my slump! What should I do, Mom?!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Listen, you need to step back and take it easy! 
From what you've been tellin' me, you've been 
training nonstop, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I have been resting properly! I sleep well, take relaxing baths…

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean! I mean going out and having fun 
with your friends to refresh yourself. You haven't been 
doing that, have you?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Just trust me! Give it a try. Let go of aaall your worries for 
a while and you might just find that it solves your problem.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I… I suppose that's true…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
B-But if I go and hang out with friends now before getting 
my running back on track, I'd just be slacking off…!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mama sent me something? I wonder what it is.

"I hope you like the swimsuit I got you. You've been so 
busy lately. Take some time to visit the beach or pool 
once in a while, dear. Love, Mama."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wow! What a cute swimsuit! "Visit the beach or pool," huh? 
I'm glad she's thinking of me, but I wonder why the sudden gift.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She's so busy with work and usually leaves me 
to my own business, so why… Oh…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Could it be she knows how horribly I did 
in the recent practice race?!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe she thinks I'm doing a poor job of taking care of myself 
because of that…? No, I'm overthinking things. There's no way 
she could've…)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I'll definitely win the next race and make sure she knows I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh… I can't believe I ended up arguing with Mom yesterday…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, what am I doing, wasting my time out here 
on the racetrack? I've gotta focus! I'm going to 
nail training today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling she'd be here! 
Um, would you like to run with me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"I haven't been able to get back into shape since 
the practice race the other day, no matter what I do. 
Has it been the same for you, Spe?"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"Y-Yeah! The more I think about it, the more confused I get 
about my running form. But everything was fine before…"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"I know what you mean. I'm in the same boat. That's why 
I thought challenging someone to a race might help me 
get back into stride, so…"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Clouds of dust, pounding footsteps, someone ahead of me… Yes, this is what it's like to race! It's all coming back to me!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(All right! We're almost at the fourth corner! All I've gotta do 
now is work these arms and legs and overtake Scarlet!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Wait, why aren't I speeding up…?! How am I supposed 
to move my arms again? Just what's my form supposed 
to be when I run?!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Ah! The gap between us is going to widen 
even more if I don't hurry! I have to change gears… 
How do I do that again?!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Oh nooo, what should I do?!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gah!

text_block_list.name: Spe and Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant… Pant…!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My goodness… Their forms are all over the place. 
They must've lost all sense of their own running styles.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling they might've forgotten some other things, 
too, in their panic… Hmm, if that's the case…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Spe! I know a place that'll get you out of your rut and back 
in fantabulous form. Come with me to Bubblyland!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-there's a place like that?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I heard from Fuji that you and Scarlet haven't 
been doing well lately, so I thought we could all go.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've rented a car and invited our sports fanatic, Tickezo, 
to join us too, so we're all ready to rock 'n' roll!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That said, Scarlet passed up the offer! She said she's 
already got a training regimen locked down. Haha!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What about you? You down?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(If this training facility that Maruzensky's recommending 
really can help people get out of their slumps, then maybe 
it'll work for me too!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: C-Count me in!
And so…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Tickezo, you two'd better hold on tight! You're gonna 
experience the most amazing magic at Bubblyland!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Magic?! I'm going to that Bubbly whatchamacallit place too! 
No one can stop me!
And now, having arrived…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So this is Bubblyland…!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait! I-Is it actually possible to do any training here?!
